Steps to Reproduce:
1. Navigate to https://app.vwo.com
2. Enter credentials that trigger 'invalid credentials'
3. Click 'Sign In'
4. Note the response
Expected Result: A clear, user-friendly error message for 'invalid credentials' is shown. No sensitive data is exposed. Account remains protected.
Preconditions: User is logged in to app.vwo.com
